title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno, and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: First-party LangChain integration: use any Ollama model as an LLM, chat, or embeddings endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-like): multi-model chats, code highlighting, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: ingest PDFs → Chroma → Ollama embeddings → chat with citations.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Chainlit integration: build shareable, multi-turn chat apps around local Ollama models in minutes.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement with inline completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for macOS/Windows/Linux to chat with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official NPM package delivering the JS/TS client for Node, Deno, and browser environments.

title: ollama-py
summary: Official PyPI package: same functionality as the repo but installable via pip install ollama.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models using slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Official Rust client maintained by the Ollama team; mirrors JS/Python SDK features.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration: use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK with .NET 8 support, NuGet package, and Blazor sample chat app.

title: ollama-rag-redis
summary: Redis & Ollama RAG starter: ingest documents into Redis Vector Library and chat with Llama 3.
